title: ‘A Terrible Inheritance’: Could Andy Burnham Succeed Where Starmer Failed?
summary_full: The likely successor to Prime Minister Keir Starmer will inherit the same challenges of economic stagnation and ascendant populism. Will a divided nation be prepared to give him time?
summary_public: The likely successor to Prime Minister Keir Starmer will inherit the same challenges of economic stagnation and ascendant populism. Will a divided nation be prepared to give him time?
